LanguageData.VQE_BroadcasterModeDesc_Work: Autobroadcaster plays energetic music that makes everyone work a little bit harder.
LanguageData.VQE_BroadcasterModeDesc_Relax: Autobroadcaster plays soothing music that makes everyone a little bit more relaxed.
LanguageData.VQE_BroadcasterModeDesc_Recruitment: Autobroadcaster plays propaganda messages aimed at prisoners with the purpose of lowering their resistance.
